ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the election was held */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the election (e.g., SC, GEN) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., General, By-Election) */,
  "total_constituencies" INTEGER /* Total number of constituencies in the election */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the election campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the election ended */,
  "polling_date" TEXT /* Date when the polling took place */,
  "counting_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote counting took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "pc_no" INTEGER /* Constituency number */,
  "pc_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the constituency belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year when the constituency was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate in the election (e.g., Winner, Runner Up) */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Margin by which the candidate won or lost */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the party was founded */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party leader */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the party logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES party_leaders ("leader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party affiliation record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the candidate joined the party */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year when the candidate left the party or is currently affiliated */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason why the candidate left the party (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency where the voter is registered */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "voter_type" TEXT /* Type of voter (e.g., General, SC, ST) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  "voting_history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter's voting history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_voting_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_history_id") REFERENCES voting_history ("voting_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the constituency */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Number of voters who actually voted */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runner_ups" (
  "runner_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner-up record */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result in which the candidate was a runner up */,
  "runner_up_candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner-up candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the runner-up candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the runner-up candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_ups_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_ups_runner_up_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the election */,
  "winning_margin" INTEGER /* Margin by which the winner secured victory */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of voters who turned out */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who turned out */,
  "average_votes_per_candidate" REAL /* Average number of votes received by each candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_statistics_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_statistics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state */,
  "total_constituencies" INTEGER /* Total number of constituencies in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_leaders" (
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party leader */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the party leader */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held in the party (e.g., President, Secretary) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the party leader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the party leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_history" (
  "voting_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting history record */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "vote_cast" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the voter cast a vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_history_id")
)
